example-review.name: example-review
example-review.purpose: Produce a structured review report from a unified diff
example-review.description:
Placeholder prompt demonstrating the prompts/ entry convention.
Takes a diff and an optional focus area; produces a report with summary, concerns, and action items.

input_vars.name: diff
input_vars.description: unified diff of the change under review

input_vars.name: focus
input_vars.description: optional emphasis area such as security or performance
